title: sphaeranthus suaveolens var. abyssinicus
intro: Sphaeranthus suaveolens var. abyssinicus, also known as the Abyssinian button bush, is a plant species within the Asteraceae family. It is native to Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Sphaeranthus suaveolens var. abyssinicus is often used in infusions or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be used as a topical treatment for skin issues.
